annotations.title: Provides requisition and location details for the given Requisitions IDs
annotations.description: Provides requisition and location details for the given Requisition IDs based on the work location display setting configured for the candidate experience site.

parameters.name: searchContext
parameters.description: Search parameter to hold requisition IDs, candidate experience site number, and work location display setting.

return.description: Return parameter to hold the requisition and location coordinate details for the given Requisition IDs.
